ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or region where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "detailed_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "primary_language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the location */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the amenity */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "villa_amenities" (
  "villa_amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each villa-amenity relationship */,
  "villa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the villa */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amenity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the amenity in the villa */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("villa_amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_villa_amenities_amenity_id FOREIGN KEY ("amenity_id") REFERENCES amenities ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "villa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the villa being booked */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the booking */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., booked, canceled, confirmed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the booking was last updated */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the booking */,
  "guest_preferences" TEXT /* Guest preferences for the booking */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests made by the guest */,
  "guest_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the guest for the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the guest */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the guest */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the guest */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the guest */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the guest */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the guest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the guest account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the guest account was last updated */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Preferred language of the guest */,
  "currency_preference" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the guest */,
  "vip_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the guest is a VIP */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code for the guest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "villa_id" INTEGER /* ID of the villa being reviewed */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the guest (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or feedback from the guest */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "property_owner_response" TEXT /* Response from the property owner */,
  "photo_urls" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of photo URLs uploaded by the guest */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "price_per_day" TEXT /* Price per day for the service */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the service */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_services" (
  "booking_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking-service relationship */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "days" INTEGER /* Number of days the service is booked for */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price for the service */,
  "service_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the service booking */,
  "guest_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the service booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_services_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_services_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking the payment is for */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was made */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Status of any refunds */,
  "payment_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking being canceled */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "cancellation_fee" TEXT /* Fee charged for the cancellation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the cancellation (e.g., processed, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cancellation was requested */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded if any */,
  "guest_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the cancellation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellations_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)
